items.title: Investigate and fix 8 failing tests from cycle 4424e214
items.description: Active regression from the most recent cycle blocks CI confidence and risks masking new breakage. Fixing or retiring outdated tests is a prerequisite before any other code ships.

items.title: Run svelte-check on packages/dashboard and fix every type error
items.description: Known MODEL_TIERS undefined errors produce silent runtime failures; resolving them unblocks safe iteration on all Svelte routes and is the fastest path to a green type-check baseline.

items.title: Define memory entry schema in packages/core/src/memory/types.ts with writeMemoryEntry helper
items.description: Foundation type for the entire memory subsystem; five downstream items cannot proceed until the schema and file-lock helper exist. Highest unblocking leverage of any single item.

items.title: Delete legacy root Fastify server at src/server/main.ts and src/server/server.ts
items.description: Highest-leverage convergence action; prerequisite for route-file removals, legacy dashboard deletion, and the CI gate. Risk is moderate but scope is well-defined by the route migration checklist.

items.title: Fix /runner dashboard — MODEL_TIERS undefined, wire dispatch form, stream output
items.description: The runner is a fully broken operator tool. Root cause is the same MODEL_TIERS type resolved by rank 2, so this can complete immediately after svelte-check clears.

items.title: Fix /agents dashboard route — list real agents from .agentforge/agents/*.yaml
items.description: A broken agent listing prevents operators from inspecting the available team. Straightforward file-read wiring with clearly bounded scope in one Svelte route.

items.title: Fix /org dashboard route — org graph endpoint returns real delegation data
items.description: Empty org graph prevents topology verification, a key trust surface. Bounded to two files: the server endpoint and the Svelte page.

items.title: Fix cycle-detail page to gracefully handle killed cycles with partial phase data
items.description: Killed cycles fall outside the two-case logic, causing UI crashes that obscure failure analysis. Gap is precisely described and bounded to the cycle-detail component.

items.title: Wire /approvals dashboard to GET/POST /api/v5/cycles/:id/approval with global ApprovalModal via SSE
items.description: Server endpoints already exist in v6.7.4; wiring the dashboard closes the human-in-the-loop governance gap central to the autonomous loop. The SSE-triggered global modal delivers real-time approval prompts.

items.title: Wire review phase handler to write memory entries for MAJOR/CRITICAL findings
items.description: Review-finding entries are the primary input data for cross-cycle learning. Without this wiring the memory subsystem has no seeds. Depends on schema (rank 3) and unblocks integration tests at ranks 31-32.

items.title: Fix /api/v5/memory backend to read .agentforge/memory/*.jsonl with filter and sort
items.description: The memory API reads the wrong file format, rendering all downstream dashboard memory views inoperable. Fixing it unblocks three dashboard items and the flywheel stats card.

items.title: Migrate remaining root src/autonomous/ into packages/core/src/autonomous/ — delete root directory
items.description: Breaking migration that consolidates the execution path; prerequisite for the CI gate and stub audit. Higher cost reflects import-path updates across test fixtures.

items.title: Audit src/cli/commands/* vs packages/cli/src/commands/* — delete duplicates or shim each root command
items.description: CLI audit is a prerequisite for safely removing compat bridges at rank 14; without knowing each command's disposition, deleting bridges risks breaking callers.

items.title: Remove src/cli/compat/* bridges — inline direct package-core imports
items.description: Compat bridges add indirection that complicates debugging. Safe to remove once the CLI audit (rank 13) confirms all callers are accounted for.

items.title: Audit packages/cli/src/commands/autonomous.ts — replace all stubbed adapters with real implementations
items.description: Stubbed adapters create a behavioral fork between the package CLI and the server cycle spawner. Depends on autonomous migration (rank 12) completing first.

items.title: Fix /search dashboard route — returns no results regardless of query
items.description: Search is completely broken across all data categories; fixing it provides immediate high-frequency operator value with existing infrastructure to wire to.

items.title: Complete /branches dashboard tab — autonomous/* branches with status, age, and stale-delete button
items.description: Stale autonomous branches accumulate across cycles; the delete button prevents repo clutter and the status view provides operational clarity on in-flight work.

items.title: Wire /memory dashboard page to real backend with search box and agent filter
items.description: Wiring the memory page to the fixed API (rank 11) makes cross-cycle learning visible to operators. Straightforward UI work once the backend is live.

items.title: Update memory/+page.svelte — type chips, clickable source links, search, expandable entries
items.description: Adds richer UI detail (type chips, source links, expand-to-JSON) to the same page as rank 18. Execute after or combine with rank 18 to avoid double-touching the file; both depend on the API fix at rank 11.

items.title: Wire /flywheel dashboard to real metrics — meta-learning rate, autonomy score, velocity
items.description: Static flywheel gauges undermine trust in self-improvement claims; real computed metrics from cycles/sprints/sessions make the page a genuine signal source.

items.title: Consolidate root invoke --loop placeholder — wire through AgentForgeSession or delete and surface package CLI
items.description: A dead placeholder flag creates user confusion and sets a false expectation. Either end-to-end wiring or clean removal with updated --help eliminates the dead UX surface.

items.title: Remove root src/server/routes/flywheel.ts and src/server/routes/search.ts
items.description: Canonical versions live in packages/server; duplicate root files create divergence risk. Fast deletion once root Fastify (rank 4) is confirmed removed with no remaining callers.

items.title: Verify no production path serves legacy dashboard/index.html before deletion
items.description: Verification is the prerequisite for safe deletion at rank 24. Confirming no live path serves the legacy HTML prevents a surprise 404 in production. Fast, high-confidence task.

items.title: Delete deprecated root dashboard/index.html and dashboard/pages/ — scrub all references
items.description: After verification at rank 23, deletion removes a confusing parallel UI surface and all root script references pointing to it.

items.title: Fix src/index.ts plugin export version string — still reports 0.1.0 in the 10.x line
items.description: A stale version string is a trust signal failure that is trivially cheap to fix. Either read from package.json or delete the unused export entirely.

items.title: Render markdown in cycle phases tab using marked or markdown-it
items.description: Raw JSON in the phases tab degrades reviewer experience on the most-visited cycle detail surface. Adding a small markdown library transforms reviewer responses and gate rationales from noise to readable signal.

items.title: Verify /sprints/[version] detail page renders all fields — fill any remaining gaps
items.description: Described as mostly built; a focused verification pass and gap-fill completes the sprint detail surface before Playwright e2e tests are written at rank 30.

items.title: Verify /live activity feed renders cycle_event SSE messages with correct colors and timestamps
items.description: Quick verification task confirming SSE subscription and event rendering for operator situational awareness. Low cost and tightly bounded scope.

items.title: Add memory stats card to /flywheel — total entries, entries-per-cycle trend, memory hit rate
items.description: Memory hit rate surfaces whether cross-cycle learning is actually influencing audit behavior — the core flywheel metric. Small self-contained UI addition that depends on memory API (rank 11).

items.title: Add Playwright e2e tests under tests/e2e/ covering all major dashboard routes
items.description: E2e tests provide regression coverage for all dashboard fixes delivered in this sprint. Higher cost reflects multi-route coverage; payoff is CI-level confidence for future autonomous cycles.

items.title: Complete tests/integration/memory-flow.test.ts — cross-cycle write and audit-prompt inclusion assertions
items.description: Validates the core cross-cycle learning loop; noted as potentially slipped from v10.6.0. Completing it provides end-to-end proof that review wiring (rank 10) and API fix (rank 11) function correctly together.

items.title: Add tests/integration/memory-flow.test.ts — full cycle run asserting memory writes and audit inclusion
items.description: Describes the same test file as rank 31 from a different spec. Executor should consolidate into rank 31 or retire this item before starting to avoid duplicate effort and diverging test implementations.

items.title: Add release gate to .github/workflows/release.yml — fail build if root src/server/ or src/cli/compat/ still exists
items.description: CI enforcement gate is the durable guarantee that convergence work cannot silently regress. Execute after purge items are merged. Low-complexity CI YAML addition with high long-term value.

items.title: Pin Node version in .nvmrc and align engines.node across all packages
items.description: Version drift is a known G5 risk surface. Aligning Node engines takes minutes and prevents subtle cross-package compatibility bugs from being masked by local environment differences.

items.title: Create docs/CONVERGENCE.md mapping deprecated surfaces to canonical replacements and removal milestones
items.description: CONVERGENCE.md is the single-source-of-truth for operators navigating the deprecation landscape and serves as a forcing function to enumerate what remains in the purge. Best authored after the bulk of purge items land.
